title: Building Sales In China Climb To Six Month High
section_path: Building Sales In China Climb To Six Month High
section_path_text: Building Sales In China Climb To Six Month High
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we have been highlighting in our Weekly China Reports in recent months, various aspects of the housing sector have been improving recently. Newly released data for December also shows that sales of commercial buildings (the vast majority of which are residential homes in China) have now climbed to a six-month high. Sales of commercial buildings last month totaled 2.026 trillion yuan.
